arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Serge Gnabry took part despite reports, while Alphonso Davies and João Palhinha put in work as well
arts.sum: João Palhinha was also on the pitch for the final training session before the Bundesliga summit against second-placed Bayer 04 Leverkusen (Saturday, 6:30 p.m.). There were numerous updates to Bayern Munich ’s squad after the final training session.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl looking forward to Bayer Leverkusen throwdown
arts.sum: We want to win this game and I am really looking forward to it,” said Eberl (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ). Needless to say, Eberl is looking forward to the game.

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala “extremely happy” with Bayern Munich extension
arts.sum: I’m looking forward to the coming years, where we will hopefully be able to achieve a lot.” On Friday, Bayern Munich continued its hot streak on the financial side of the business by locking up superstar Jamal Musiala for the rest of the decade.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich future-proofing with Jamal Musiala, Alphonso Davies and many more!
arts.sum: By committing the likes of Jamal Musiala and Alphonso Davies to the club on new long-term contracts, they hope to have cemented the pillars of future success in place, while also providing the space for exciting young talents to emerge. And it is by no means a one-off; far more, it follows a pattern of contract extensions and signings aimed at setting the club up for the immediate and long-term future.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich's top 5 youngsters to watch in 2024/25
arts.sum: The young forward earned his place alongside the likes of Thomas Müller and Leon Goretzka after impressing in first-team training – having being invited to muck in with the seniors in late January. The winger, who’s been capped across various age levels for Germany and is also eligible for Nigeria, has drawn comparisons to former Borussia Dortmund star Ousmane Dembele, thanks to his explosive pace and ability to glide past defenders.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany eager for third match vs. Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany knows the challenge that lies ahead in traveling to face Bayer Leverkusen in an incredibly important Bundesliga match on Saturday. We often pressed high, which worked well, but we can also defend deep if someone dominates us in some phases.

arts.ttl: After inking blockbuster contract extension, Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala is ready to get back to work
arts.sum: After weeks of speculation, Jamal Musiala signed a contract a contract extension with Bayern Munich, which will — allegedly — more than triple his salary. Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs Bayern München preview: Title showdown in Leverkusen
arts.sum: A potential season-defining clash awaits in the Bundesliga as reigning champions Bayer Leverkusen take on league leaders Bayern München at the BayArena on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Predicted XIs | Bayer Leverkusen vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The biggest game of the weekend and the biggest game in the season sees Bayer Leverkusen host Bayern Munich in a must-win game for the hosts. For Leverkusen, they have…

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, and more!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be bringing a 2-1 advantage into the second leg of the Champions League Round of 32 or playoffs phase against Celtic, but an even bigger match precedes that: a potential title-deciding clash with Bayer Leverkusen. Here’s what Sky have for their predicted lineups for both teams.
